title: Koregaon Park Flat Burglary
description: Residents of a 4th floor apartment in Koregaon Park returned from a weekend trip to find their flat had been broken into. Lock picked cleanly, no signs of forced entry. Cash, laptop, and jewellery stolen. Neighbours reported seeing an unfamiliar man in a delivery uniform in the building two days prior.
modus_operandi: Solo operator, lock picking, pre-visit in disguise to scout, targeted weekend absence, no forced entry.

suspects.description: Male, 5'8", slim, seen in blue delivery uniform, clean-shaven

evidence.description: Neighbour described man in delivery uniform on Wednesday prior
No forced entry, lock picked — specialised skill indicated
Building lobby camera captured delivery uniform suspect, face partially visible

blind_spots: Delivery company logs not checked until day 6
Lock picking MO not cross-referenced with similar Pune cases from 2019
Building visitor log not collected on day 0
resolution: CCTV face matched a suspect with prior lock-picking arrest in Pune 2019. Arrested day 13 in Kothrud.
